In Q3, we upgraded to include CodeScreen and added 15 more seats. Now here's where the problem begins. In October 2023, we received an email saying our plan was being migrated to a new pricing structure. The new structure removed unlimited CodePair sessions and replaced them with a pool of 500 sessions/month. We were not consulted. We were not given the option to stay on our original plan. When I called support, I was transferred 4 times and ultimately told that the original plan no longer exists. I escalated to our account manager — no response for 3 weeks. I then emailed the VP of Sales — got a generic response pointing me back to support. This has been going on for 8 months. I have documented everything. I have emails, I have recordings (in a one-party consent state), and I have the original contract. I need three things: 1) Restore our original plan terms for the remainder of our contract, 2) Credit us for the overage charges we incurred under the new plan ($12,340), and 3) A direct contact — not a support ticket, not a chatbot — a human being with decision-making authority. If these are not addressed within 7 business days, my legal counsel has advised me that we have grounds for breach of contract and we will proceed accordingly. And before you give me a canned response about 'escalating to the appropriate team', let me be clear: I have been escalated 6 times already. I need resolution, not escalation."}]
